issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a custom trigger for 'when a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck', not 'Activated'. The card effect is triggered by a game state change (DON returned to deck), not by player activation.
Missing condition 'DuringYourTurn' and 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Text states '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' and 'Once Per Turn' must be enforced.

Action 'GiveDon' is incomplete. The effect should 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active', which requires specifying source (DON deck), count (up to 1), and potentially a 'set as active' state modifier not captured by GiveDon alone.
Missing target specification. The effect modifies cards from 'your DON!! deck', which should be explicitly targeted.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
